name: example-icm
description: The routing index. The dispatcher shows the model only these one-line summaries; it routes to one entry, reads it, and answers from that text.
domain: a tiny task tracker (example instance for the ICM host)

entries.title: Tasks overview
entries.summary: What the tasks table is, its columns (id, title, status, priority), and how a row is shaped. The shape the oracle enforces.

entries.title: Statuses and priorities
entries.summary: The allowed status values (todo, doing, done) and the priority scale (1 highest to 5 lowest). The enum and range rules.

entries.title: Extending this ICM
entries.summary: How to add KB entries, schemas, tools, and flows to turn this example into your own ICM. Where each piece lives.
